description: Oversees manufacturing process, production planning, and workflow coordination
Performs manufacturing tasks, assembles furniture components
Inspects finished products, ensures quality standards are met
Manages inventory, storage, and material flow in warehouse
Handles materials, picks orders, manages stock levels
Handles customer orders, provides product information, processes sales
Leads sales team, develops sales strategies, monitors performance
Handles customer inquiries, complaints, and after-sales support
Manages financial records, invoicing, VAT, and cost calculations
Sources and purchases raw materials, manages supplier relationships
Designs new furniture models, creates technical specifications
Maintains IT systems, database management, software support
Overall company management, strategic decision making
Coordinates shipping, delivery schedules, and transportation
